data.title: Travere's shares plummeted after delay of Filspari drug for kidney disease; investors react, Ligand also impacted.
data.description: Shares of Travere Therapeutics plummeted on Tuesday following news of a setback for their drug, Filspari, in the treatment of kidney disease. The delay in the drug's development caused a significant drop in the company's stock prices. The pharmaceutical company, along with Ligand, experienced a sharp decline in their shares as investors reacted to the unexpected setback for their key drug. This news was reported in Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the impact of the delay on the companies involved.

data.title: Align Technology sponsors 30 Invisalign treatments for children and teens through Smiles4Canada program in partnership with CFAO.
data.description: In TEMPE, Arizona, Align Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALGN) revealed a partnership with the Canadian Foundation for the Advancement of Orthodontics (CFAO). As part of this collaboration, Align will be providing Invisalign treatment for 30 qualified patients. Align Technology is recognized for its Invisalign system, iTero intraoral scanners, and exocad CAD/CAM software for digital orthodontics and restorative dentistry. This initiative showcases the company's dedication to advancing orthodontic care in partnership with CFAO.

data.title: Dow Jones, S&P 500 drop as financials and software slump, Google leads AI stocks in buy zones.
data.description: The stock market saw a decline from recent highs as the Dow Jones, S&P 500 fell, mainly due to decreases in financial and software sectors. However, there was optimism surrounding Google and other companies involved in artificial intelligence (AI) as they were found to be in favorable buy zones. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: DOD invests $1 billion in L3Harris, plans missile IPO. LHX stock hits record highs. Trump Admin involved.
data.description: The Trump Administration has announced a substantial investment of $1 billion in L3Harris, along with the acquisition of an ownership stake in the spinout of their missile business. This news has caused a surge in LHX stock prices, reaching record highs. L3Harris is set to receive the substantial investment from the Department of Defense and is planning an initial public offering for its missile business.

data.title: Dow and S&P 500 drop from record highs, Caterpillar rises as Moderna soars. Inflation data impact felt.
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow and S&P 500 experienced declines from their previous record highs. However, Caterpillar showed progress towards a significant milestone. The stock market today observed the Dow plummet as investors processed inflation data, while Moderna experienced a surge.

data.title: TG Therapeutics stock (NASDAQ: TGTX) surged in after-hours trading following positive Q4 revenue estimates and optimistic 2026 outlook.
data.description: Shares of TG Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TGTX) saw an increase during after-hours trading on Tuesday following the release of preliminary fourth quarter revenue estimates and a positive forecast for 2026. The company anticipates a strong performance in the coming year. For more information and in-depth analysis, please visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Strive's shares drop 12% post Semler agreement to grow Bitcoin treasury, adding 5,048 BTC to make total holdings 12,797.9 BTC, ranking 11th.
data.description: In an all-stock agreement, Semler's contribution of 5,048 BTC has been acquired by Strive, boosting their total BTC holdings to 12,797.9. This places Strive at the 11th position among public companies in terms of BTC reserves.

data.title: GIGABYTE offers a new AI interaction experience at CES 2026, showcasing "The World as Prompt."
data.description: In Taipei on January 13, 2026, GIGABYTE introduces a fresh approach to human interaction with artificial intelligence at the CES 2026 event, held from January 6 to January 9. Through the concept of "The World as Prompt," the company showcases a captivating AI-powered encounter that merges...

data.title: ISS recommends shareholders of New Gold vote "FOR" plan with Coeur Mining. Board unanimously supports the transaction.
data.description: The Board of Directors at New Gold Inc. have unanimously advised shareholders to vote in favor of a transaction. This recommendation was made public on January 13, 2026, by the company headquartered in Toronto. New Gold is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: NGD) and the NYSE American (NGD). The Board's recommendation comes following the support of a prominent independent proxy advisory firm.

data.title: Digital Silk reveals 7 common idea sources for customer-led content trends. Agency analyzes customer interactions to extract insights.
data.description: A digital agency based in Miami called Digital Silk recently released a new analysis on how organizations gather content ideas from customer interactions and feedback. This analysis focuses on branding, custom web design, and digital marketing. The findings from this study were published on January 13, 2026.

data.title: Hydro One and Society of United Professionals reach tentative agreement for collective agreement covering employees.
data.description: In Toronto on January 13, 2026, Hydro One Networks Inc. and the Society of United Professionals have announced a tentative agreement for the collective agreement covering employees represented by the Society. This agreement involves a significant number of employees, helping to ensure their rights and benefits are protected.

data.title: Teradyne (NASDAQ: TER) to announce Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 2, 2026 at 5:00 p.m. ET. Conference call on Feb 3 at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: In North Reading, Massachusetts, Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ: TER) is set to announce its financial performance for Q4 and full year of 2025 on February 2, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. ET or later. Following this, a conference call discussing the results and management's business outlook will take place on February 3, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Interested investors can join the webcast at investors.teradyne.com/events-presentations at least five minutes prior to the start.

data.title: Liftoff Mobile, Inc. files for IPO with Form S-1, a global leader in mobile app solutions.
data.description: Redwood City, California-based company Liftoff Mobile, Inc. revealed on January 13, 2026, that it has submitted a registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Liftoff specializes in performance marketing and monetization solutions for the mobile app sector and is recognized as a prominent player in this industry on a global scale. This move signifies the company's intention to go public, marking a significant step in its growth trajectory.

data.title: Record volume seen in Kalshi prediction markets during NFL Playoffs. $455 million bet on Saturday, $466 million on Sunday. DKNG stock shows weakness. Prediction markets could impact sports betting stocks in 2026.
data.description: Analysts predict over $30 billion will be wagered on the NFL in 2025, pushing sports betting stocks into the spotlight. However, recent reports show DraftKings stock declining due to the rise of prediction markets, hitting record volumes during the first six NFL Playoff games. Kalshi, a prediction market platform, saw a surge with $455 million in betting volume on Saturday and $466 million on Sunday. Sports accounted for over 90% of the volume, with top markets including NFL games, NBA games, multi-sport parlays, NFL same game parlays, and NFL spreads. This growth in prediction markets is impacting traditional sports betting companies like DraftKings.

data.title: FaceTec appoints Cameron D'Ambrosi as Head of Strategic Partnerships for NA and EU. Global leader in 3D Face Verification software.
data.description: FaceTec, a prominent provider of 3D Face Verification software worldwide, recently appointed Cameron D'Ambrosi as the Head of Strategic Partnerships for North America and Europe. The announcement was made on January 6, 2026, in Summerlin, Nevada. Cameron D'Ambrosi will oversee partnerships for FaceTec in these key regions, bringing his expertise to drive growth and collaboration.
